generated_oml:
instance PM_SynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission (gearwheel)"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox"
]

instance SINUMERIK840DController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for axis control via position, speed, or acceleration inputs"
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor for measuring input current I_M"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance InputCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink, SysMLModelingTool
]

instance SecondaryPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured position data from secondary encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink, SysMLModelingTool
]

instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current I_M"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink, SysMLModelingTool
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque data from input current"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity from motor position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance SysML_StructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML structural model (BDD and IBD)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance AAS_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance Simulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, FrictionModelExchangeService, VisualizationService
]

instance SysMLModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS)"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT for data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance DashboardTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tool"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossInsight
]

instance FrictionModelExchangeService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic friction model exchange based on real-time data analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides DynamicModelExchangeAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization of simulated vs. measured data in a unified dashboard to enhance robot motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionLossInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction loss detection insights used to adjust control parameters and improve motion accuracy"
]

instance DynamicModelExchangeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic friction model exchange based on real-time data analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of simulated vs. measured data for enhanced robot motion accuracy"
]

instance MABIMAX100_Axis1 : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PM_SynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGearbox, SINUMERIK840DController, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction as the system is a digital shadow with one-way data flow from physical to virtual (per Kritzinger et al. [32])."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming via MQTT with continuous updates for live data processing and friction model identification."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of physical robot components (motor, gearboxes), sensor data via MQTT, Simulink processing models, SysML structural models, AAS, and dashboard visualization for unified friction analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As-operated stage, leveraging live operational data to model friction changes due to wear, tool variations, and application-specific conditions."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data (from white-box and black-box models) against measured reference values to assess friction model accuracy and deviation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data transmission from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for digital representation, SysML for system modeling, adhering to Industry 4.0 standards."
]
